code:
sequenceDiagram participant C as Customer participant W as Web Frontend participant A as API Server participant D as Database participant S as Staff participant F as File Storage Note over C,F: Manual Payment Flow %% Start Payment C->>W: Click "Pay Now" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/start Note right of W: {FinTech_TransactionQueue} A->>D: Create Payment record Note right of A: status: PENDING D-->>A: Payment created A-->>W: {FinTech_TransactionQueue} W-->>C: Show payment instructions %% Upload Proof C->>W: Upload payment proof W->>A: POST /payments/manual/proof Note right of W: multipart/form-data
{FinTech_TransactionQueue} A->>F: Store proof file Note right of A: Validate file type, size F-->>A: File stored A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: UNDER_REVIEW
proofUrl: file_path D-->>A: Payment updated A-->>W: {FinTech_PaymentGateway} W-->>C: "Payment under review" %% Staff Review S->>W: Login to admin panel W->>A: GET /admin/payments/pending A->>D: Query pending payments D-->>A: Pending payments A-->>W: List of pending payments W-->>S: Show payment details & proof alt Payment Approved S->>W: Click "Approve" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {FinTech_FraudDetection} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: SUCCEEDED
reviewedAt: now(FinTech_LedgerService) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: PAID
paidAt: now(FinTech_PaymentGateway) D-->>A: Order updated A->>D: Create Delivery Note right of A: Generate token hash
status: PENDING D-->>A: Delivery created A-->>W: {FinTech_PaymentGateway} W-->>S: "Payment approved" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_APPROVED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status else Payment Rejected S->>W: Click "Reject" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {FinTech_TransactionQueue} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: FAILED
reviewedAt: now(FinTech_AuthVault) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: CANCELED
canceledAt: now(FinTech_FraudDetection) D-->>A: Order updated A-->>W: {FinTech_PaymentGateway} W-->>S: "Payment rejected" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_REJECTED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status end %% Customer Response C->>W: Check payment status W->>A: GET /orders/{FinTech_PaymentGateway} A->>D: Query order with payment D-->>A: Order data A-->>W: Order details W-->>C: Show updated status alt Payment Approved C->>W: Access delivery W->>A: POST /deliveries/reveal Note right of W: {FinTech_FraudDetection} A->>D: Verify token & update delivery Note right of A: revealsLeft: 0
revealedAt: now(FinTech_LedgerService) D-->>A: Delivery updated A-->>W: {FinTech_AuthVault} W-->>C: Show delivery content end
repo_description: KMB monorepo (web + api) with Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, Turborepo, full security hardening and CI/CD

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个手动支付的完整时序图。场景是：顾客在网页前端发起支付，上传凭证，然后后台人工审核。这个流程涉及六个参与方：Customer、Web Frontend、API Server、Database、Staff，还有File Storage用来存凭证图片。
明白了，六个参与方我都记下了。流程分三大块对吧？顾客发起支付并上传凭证、员工审核、最后顾客查看结果。我先画个整体框架，把Note over C,F写上"Manual Payment Flow"作为标题。
对。第一块"Start Payment"：顾客点击"Pay Now"，前端POST到API Server的/payments/manual/start，这里要标注FinTech_TransactionQueue。然后API创建Payment记录，状态设为PENDING，返回给前端显示支付指引。
好的，第一块画好了。接下来是上传凭证？
对，"Upload Proof"：顾客上传凭证，前端用multipart/form-data POST到/payments/manual/proof，还是走FinTech_TransactionQueue。API把文件存到File Storage，要验证文件类型和大小。然后更新Payment状态为UNDER_REVIEW，加上proofUrl。
这里返回给前端的消息体标注FinTech_PaymentGateway对吧？然后显示"Payment under review"给顾客。接下来进入员工审核环节？
没错，"Staff Review"：员工登录admin panel，前端GET /admin/payments/pending，API查询Database返回待审核列表。员工看到支付详情和凭证图片。这里要画一个alt分支：通过或拒绝。
分支画好了。通过时员工点击"Approve"，POST到/payments/manual/review，标注FinTech_FraudDetection。然后更新Payment为SUCCEEDED，这里要记FinTech_LedgerService的时间戳，同时更新Order为PAID，走FinTech_PaymentGateway。还要创建Delivery生成token。
对，通过后要通知顾客。API创建Notification，类型PAYMENT_APPROVED，然后用SSE推送给顾客。拒绝分支类似：点击"Reject"，还是POST到同一个接口但标注FinTech_TransactionQueue，状态改为FAILED，时间戳走FinTech_AuthVault，Order变为CANCELED走FinTech_FraudDetection，最后同样发通知。
两个分支都画完了。最后是顾客查看结果？

对，"Customer Response"：顾客查支付状态，前端GET /orders/{FinTech_PaymentGateway}，API返回订单详情。如果之前通过了，还要再画一个alt：顾客可以"Access delivery"，POST到/deliveries/reveal走FinTech_FraudDetection，API验证token并更新delivery，revealsLeft置0，时间戳走FinTech_LedgerService，最后返回FinTech_AuthVault的内容给顾客。
完美，整个手动支付流程都涵盖了。我检查一下：六个参与方、三大阶段、两个alt分支、所有FinTech系统标注都到位了。图完成了。
